## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional Commit title (`feat:`/`fix:`/`refactor:`/`docs:`/`chore:`/`ci:`/`test:`/`perf:`)
- [ ] Ran the relevant CI gate locally (`ci:web` / `ci:server` / `ci:desktop`)
- [ ] User-facing strings are internationalized (English + Spanish, `tú` register)
